public_label: [FiniteRootWitnesses] root-native biology readout — 5 structural closures, real biology stays OPEN

two_lines.discipline: TWO LINES THAT MUST NEVER BE MIXED (founder, 2026-07-21).
two_lines.line_1_root_native: LINE-1 ROOT-NATIVE biology = grown from the retained-difference root; NO DNA / cell / enzyme / fitness / external biology equation as a premise. This is the ONLY line counted in the 47.2%/62.5% score below. Verifier: biology_closure_v0_1.py. Green Coq substrate: InfoBioHomeostasis_attempt.v, InfoHealthCausalRelax_attempt.v, InfoHealthCuspFold_attempt.v, InfoCoupledCuspEP3_attempt.v (axiom-clean, root-native, back already-counted substrate nodes -- they do NOT raise the 47.2%).
two_lines.line_2_textbook_checker: LINE-2 TEXTBOOK biology solver = a calculator for existing biology formulas (curriculum 45/45 checklist, tier textbook_closure/finite_diagnostic, NO Th_coqc; 5 declared-[Open] items: full Hodgkin-Huxley, MD/protein-folding, Luria-Delbrück, Turing selection, ML phylogeny). Used ONLY as a checker/calibration reference, NEVER fed back as if root-derived. InfoEpidemicThreshold_attempt.v imports the SIR model as a premise and is REFUSED for LINE-1 -- checker-only. The textbook 45/45 is explicitly NOT counted toward the 47.2%/62.5% root-native score.
two_lines.mixing_would_cause: If LINE-1 and LINE-2 are mixed, the project would look like it 'closed biology 100%' when it only 'computes imported formulas.' This is the exact failure mode this file exists to block.

established: BIO-G1 Ordered Sequence Carrier: the count carrier N^G FAILS (nu(ab)=nu(ba)=(1,1) but nu(F(ab))=(2,0)!=nu(F(ba))=(0,2)); the ordered quotient q_seq CLOSES exact. STRUCTURALLY_CLOSED. 'sequence' != amino-acid chain until calibrated.

BIO-G2 Functional Quotient q_F: order != function (intervention-response equivalence, swap-invariant O; failing keep-first-letter control breaks output factorization). CLOSED as function. The word 'protein' is PARTIAL/UNCALIBRATED (needs a semantic card).

BIO-G3 Living-Unit Closure: conditional input-state-output; self-maintaining fixed point V_A=Gamma(V_A); no-free-repair ledger x'+e'=x+e+j-d; passing (1,1) in V_A, failing (1,0) not in V_A; mortality = irreversible exit from V_A. CONDITIONALLY_CLOSED. Not a real cell until calibrated.

BIO-G4 Heredity + lineage: q_H via descendant signatures; frequency p_{j,n+1} from lineage counts B (fixture B=diag(2,1), N0=(1,1) -> p1=(2/3,1/3)); NO fitness as a root variable. Heredity-count STRUCTURALLY_CLOSED; biological-selection semantics UNCALIBRATED.

T2 endogenous operator L_R[Theta]: operator-memory augmentation; I-only quotient fails (z1=(1,1,0), z2=(1,1,1) same q_I before, differ after), augmented (I,Theta) closes exact. CLOSED_BY_AUGMENTATION.

Green Coq substrate (root-native, axiom-clean, re-compiled 2026-07-21): InfoBioHomeostasis_attempt.v (decay_geometric, homeostasis_balance, turnover_is_production), InfoHealthCausalRelax_attempt.v (setpoint / one-step / n-step error), InfoHealthCuspFold_attempt.v (bistable window, critical slowing), InfoCoupledCuspEP3_attempt.v (coupling energy, locked-iff-energy-zero, one-way-breaks-conservation). These back the living-unit/homeostasis/relaxation SUBSTRATE nodes already counted above (quality evidence); they do NOT raise the 47.2% strict score.

36-node Minimal Root-Native Biology DAG closure audit: closed 17/36, partial 11/36, open 8/36; strict 17/36=47.2%, weighted (17+11/2)/36=22.5/36=62.5%; lift from the founder's pre-closure 13/11/12=36.1%/51.4% baseline
